name: make-it
description: Make It! — app de tarefas + rotina. Monorepo: API (Express) + Web (React).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm -w apps/api run dev" "npm -w apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w apps/api run build && npm -w apps/web run build
scripts.test: npm -w apps/api run test && npm -w apps/web run test
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/api run lint --if-present && npm -w apps/web run lint --if-present
